note: Phase I-A 最小の次: HF gpt2 で層別 S_asym 統計（ラベル無し）。完全ログは experiments/logs/（.gitignore）。
command: python experiments/v7_phase1a_phi_correlation.py --cpu --model gpt2 --seed 0 --text "Hello, we need to align on the deadline before Friday." --out experiments/logs/v7_suite/phase1a_hf_gpt2_stats.json
implementation_note: AutoModelForCausalLM は attn_implementation=eager で output_attentions を取得
